lead.title: First depositor donation inflation in Vault.deposit
lead.exploit_sentence: Because the first depositor can mint dust shares and donate assets before a victim deposit, the attacker can inflate share price so the victim receives zero shares and then redeem the victim's assets.

pattern.title: ERC4626 first-depositor donation inflation
steps: Start from an empty or near-empty vault state.
Attacker donates underlying directly to inflate share price.
Victim performs a normal deposit and receives zero/fewer shares.
Attacker redeems shares and extracts victim value.
assertions: assertLt(victimShares, expectedFairShares, 'victim shares were not diluted');
assertEq(attackerGain, victimLoss, 'attacker gain must equal victim loss');
pattern.control: Apply donation/min-share/virtual-offset protection or execute honest deposit order and assert victim receives fair shares.

run.lead_db_command_after_generation: python3 <skill-dir>/scripts/lead_db.py add-poc audit-leads.json L-0001 --path test/L0001VaultInflationPoC.t.sol --command "forge test --match-path test/L0001VaultInflationPoC.t.sol --match-test test_exploit_attackerStealsVictimDepositViaDonationInflation -vvvv" --status PLANNED --summary "generated scaffold; exploit assertions still TODO"
run.lead_db_command_after_pass: python3 <skill-dir>/scripts/lead_db.py add-poc audit-leads.json L-0001 --path test/L0001VaultInflationPoC.t.sol --command "forge test --match-path test/L0001VaultInflationPoC.t.sol --match-test test_exploit_attackerStealsVictimDepositViaDonationInflation -vvvv" --status PASS --summary "PoC passes and asserts concrete impact"
